critical_algorithms: Semantic ad matching (advertiser product entity → query entity)
revenue_mechanics: Entity resolution increases query understanding → higher ad relevance
Semantic matching reduces wasted ad spend → higher advertiser ROI → higher CPCs
Knowledge panels increase SERP engagement → more ad impressions
Entity graph enables long-tail keyword capture (billions of entity combinations)
customer_acquisition: Advertisers discover relevant audiences via entity targeting
Long-tail entity coverage captures niche advertisers
Entity-based bidding (bid on 'iPhone 15' entity vs keyword)
cross_sell: Related entity suggestions expand advertiser targeting
Category-level upsells (advertise on parent category entities)
Entity performance analytics drive campaign expansion

revenue_mechanics: 20-40% increase in average order value (basket size)
customer_acquisition: Product discovery via recommendation = new customer capture
Sponsored product placement in recommendation slots

revenue_mechanics: 25.6% YoY growth driven by graph-powered targeting
14% increase in ad impressions (better targeting = more demand)
10% increase in cost per ad (performance-driven bidding)
customer_acquisition: Lookalike audiences find new customers similar to best customers
Interest targeting captures users in relevant affinity groups
Social proof (friend likes brand) drives discovery
cross_sell: Interest graph expansion (user likes A → target users who like A + B)
Engagement propagation (friend engaged with product → show to network)
Retargeting via pixel (website visitor → ad audience)
Dynamic product ads (browsed product → show related products)

query_entity.description: The initiating entity seeking a match

candidate_entity.description: The target entity being matched to

attribute_entity.mortgage_os: Credit Score, DTI, Loan Purpose, Property Type

capability_match.plastic_os: ACCEPTS_POLYMER, ACCEPTS_FORM, CAN_RUN (facility meets intake specs)

entity_disambiguation.description: Resolve query intent to precise match targets
entity_disambiguation.google: Query 'Apple' → Apple Inc. vs apple fruit based on context
entity_disambiguation.amazon: Session context (browsing history) disambiguates product intent
entity_disambiguation.meta: User profile + behavior disambiguates ad targeting
entity_disambiguation.plastic_os: Polymer family hierarchy (PE → HDPE/LDPE) disambiguates material type
entity_disambiguation.mortgage_os: Loan purpose + property type disambiguates product category (VA vs FHA)

collaborative_filtering.description: Find matches based on similar entity behavior
collaborative_filtering.google: Users who clicked X also clicked Y (query expansion)
collaborative_filtering.amazon: Customers who bought X also bought Y (item-to-item CF)
collaborative_filtering.meta: Users similar to you engaged with X (lookalike audiences)
collaborative_filtering.plastic_os: Facilities that processed X successfully also processed Y (material affinity)
collaborative_filtering.mortgage_os: Borrowers similar to you closed with X (loan product affinity)

graph_embeddings.mortgage_os: LoanProduct embeddings for similarity (KGE via CompoundE3D)

multi_hop_traversal.google: Entity → Related Entity → Ad (2-hop semantic ad matching)
multi_hop_traversal.amazon: Customer → Product A → Product B ← Other Customers (co-purchase)
multi_hop_traversal.plastic_os: Intake → Facility → Successful Transaction → Similar Intakes

real_time_personalization.google: Query context (location, device, search history) adjusts entity relevance
real_time_personalization.amazon: Session context (cart, browsing) adjusts product ranking
real_time_personalization.meta: Real-time behavior (scroll, hover) adjusts ad delivery
real_time_personalization.plastic_os: Intake urgency, geography, batch size adjust facility ranking
real_time_personalization.mortgage_os: Borrower urgency, rate sensitivity adjust product ranking

pipeline_generation.google: Long-tail entity targeting captures niche advertisers (new customers)
pipeline_generation.amazon: Product discovery via recommendations = new customer acquisition
pipeline_generation.meta: Lookalike audiences find new customers similar to best customers
pipeline_generation.plastic_os: Material-facility matching surfaces processors for new material types
pipeline_generation.mortgage_os: Borrower-product matching surfaces lenders for niche loan types

conversion_optimization.description: Graph improves match quality → higher close rates
conversion_optimization.google: Semantic ad matching reduces wasted spend → 8x ROI for advertisers
conversion_optimization.meta: Interest targeting + lookalikes → 25.6% YoY ad revenue growth
conversion_optimization.plastic_os: Equipment-form matching + contamination tolerance → higher transaction success
conversion_optimization.mortgage_os: Credit-DTI-LTV matching + lender approval history → higher loan approval rate

expansion_cross_sell.description: Graph identifies additional revenue per entity
expansion_cross_sell.google: Related entity suggestions expand advertiser targeting (cross-sell)
expansion_cross_sell.amazon: 20-40% average order value increase via bundle recommendations
expansion_cross_sell.meta: Interest expansion (user likes A → target A + B) = upsell
expansion_cross_sell.plastic_os: Material affinity (processed PE → suggest PP) = volume expansion

retention_loyalty.description: Graph predicts churn and drives re-engagement
retention_loyalty.google: Entity-based bidding creates advertiser lock-in (switching cost)
retention_loyalty.amazon: Re-purchase recommendations drive repeat customer behavior
retention_loyalty.meta: Engagement graph predicts churn → re-engagement campaigns
retention_loyalty.plastic_os: Transaction history graph predicts facility churn → relationship manager alert
retention_loyalty.mortgage_os: Champion tracking (job change) predicts churn → re-engagement workflow

efficiency_scale.description: Graph enables automation at massive scale
efficiency_scale.google: 8.5B searches/day, sub-100ms response (impossible without graph index)
efficiency_scale.amazon: Billions of products × millions of customers = trillions of edges
efficiency_scale.plastic_os: Thousands of facilities × thousands of materials = millions of match scenarios
efficiency_scale.mortgage_os: 250+ loan programs × 50+ lenders × thousands of borrowers daily
